title: Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
summary: The Big Technology AI Summit (June 2026) convened industry leaders to discuss the fallout from the federal government's recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models. Sessions covered AI infrastructure buildout, enterprise ROI shifts from token optimization to outcome maximization, cybersecurity implications, and competitive dynamics between the US and China in AI development.
